name: Turkey Tortilla Casual
recipeIngredient: 1 jar (8oz) Mexican salsa, green or red
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cook and stir the ground turkey and onion in a nonstick skillet until brown.
3. Transfer to a colander and rinse with hot water to wash away any excess fat.
4. Shake dry.
5. Spread half cup of salsa in bottom of ungreased square baking dish.
6. Mix remaining salsa, sour cream, soup, and pimientos.
7. Layer half the tortilla strips, turkey mixture, soup mixture, and cheese in baking dish.
8. Repeat layering with remaining ingredients.
9. Bake uncovered until casserole is hot and bubbly, about 30 minutes.
10. Let stand 10 minutes.
11. Garnish with olives if desired.
